title: A Message with Strings and Number values

content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to create a Python program that displays a message containing both text and a number using the `print()` function.

Your program should output the following format:

`The price of the product is 99 dollars.
`Make sure to combine the text and number in a single call to the `print()` function to achieve the desired output.

sampleTestCases.output: The price of the product is 99 dollars.

hidden.expectedOutput: The price of the product is 99 dollars.
